since_last: 41% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.63%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.76% · BTC -2.24% · Gold -0.63% · Nasdaq100 -2.13%. 41% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.63%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.63%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.16%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: LRCX is the standout at -8.68%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +4.28%, OKLO +3.90%, OKLO +3.90%, SMR +3.34%, NOW +3.03%. Laggards: LRCX -8.68%, KLAC -8.26%, MU -7.91%, VRT -7.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.65% at $155.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.65% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
